title: Hornet In Minecraft
description: A Minecraft Datapack that adds Hornet from the hit game Silksong to the game!
body:
This is a Datapack that adds the character Hornet from Hollow Knight: Silksong to Minecraft!

Currently almost everything is implimented, and there is more to come!

Includes:
- All Yellow Tools
- Most Blue Tools
- All Crests & Silkskills
- All Abilities (except Needle Strike)

!only one player can be Hornet at once, or else it causes glitches!

How to use it:
Simply install the Datapack and the Resource pack (if you're playing on a server put it as a required Resource pack. If you're using version 1.1+ don't install the resourcepack, just put the datapack in your resourcepacks and enable it.) and use this command once for the player you want to be Hornet!

/tag <name> add hornet

and that's it!


The keybinds:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Dash - Sprint

Harpoon - look forward and press sneak while holding the Needle

Silksoar - look down and hold sneak while holding the Needle and let go once it's ready

Double Jump/Glide - press jump while in the air (Glide will work after you Double Jumped)

Bind (heal) - press the offhand while holding the Needle

Taunt - drop the Needle

Needolin - look partially down and press shift

Wall Jump - be next to a wall and jump in the air, additionally, you will slide down walls

Ledge Grab - be next to a ledge and be in the air

Silk Skill - right click while holding the Needle

Sprint Attack - sprint and look forward and attack

Pogo - look down or diagonally (depending on the crest) and attack


</details>



Even though some of the tools are implemented, you cannot equip them without commands just yet. If you want to equip a tool just use this command with the name of the tool, but instead of a space put an underscore.

/tag <name> add <tool_name>

for example:

/tag @s add magnetite_dice

/tag @s add shell_satchel

/tag @s claw_mirror
etc.

Tools mostly do what they do in Silksong, except that Shell Shards are now Exp and Rosaries are now Items, so Shell Satchel gives you more Exp and Theif's Mark gives you more loot.
